summary: Lead Software Engineer with over 20 years of experience in backend development, specializing in Python and scalable systems for enterprise environments. Proficient in designing RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, and integrating AI technologies like OpenAI and Bedrock to drive innovative solutions. Expertise spans database optimization, CI/CD pipelines, and mentoring engineers to deliver high-performance applications. Skilled in Docker, Kubernetes, and modern development practices for building robust platforms. Eager to contribute to PMG’s mission of delivering AI-driven digital marketing solutions with measurable impact.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Developed an end-to-end agentic pipeline using Python and AI technologies like Bedrock, integrating multi-step workflows for job scoring and application tracking. Leveraged RESTful API designs and microservices principles to ensure scalability. Implemented semantic duplicate detection with FAISS vector embeddings for efficient processing of 100+ job postings.
highlights: Designed and built 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline (intake → score → tailor → generate → render → quality gate → track)
Implemented semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring, resume tailoring, and cover letter generation
Built quality gate with automated pattern detection to prevent bad output from reaching submission
Used Claude Code and MCP servers for AI-accelerated development throughout

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Engineered an AI-driven forecasting engine using Python and PySpark, replacing manual processes and reducing cycles by 90%. Integrated scalable backend systems with microservices architecture for real-time capacity insights. Built interactive dashboards with Streamlit to support data-driven decisions.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform on AWS using S3, Glue, and Athena, integrating AI technologies with Bedrock for Text-to-SQL GenAI agents. Optimized backend ETL processes with microservices architecture for enterprise scalability. Resolved small file issues using Snappy and Parquet compression for efficient data handling.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Conducted data mining of user performance metrics to optimize critical systems, leveraging backend development skills. Built scalable solutions to enhance system performance and reliability.
